name: v1.0.4
body: First release with full RepoMesh evidence pipeline:
CycloneDX SBOM generated and attached
SLSA-style provenance statement attached
Signed ReleasePublished event broadcast to ledger
This release should converge to trust score 100/100 in the network.

name: v1.0.3
body: RepoMesh smoke test — broadcast workflow with push auth fix.

name: v1.0.2
body: First RepoMesh-enabled release. Broadcast workflow will emit a signed ReleasePublished event to the RepoMesh ledger.

name: v0.1.3
body: The treatment — SECURITY.md, scorecard, coverage CI, VS Marketplace badge, standard footer, re-translated 7 languages.

name: v0.4.5
body: Added 82 new tests covering previously untested modules:
`formatters.test.ts` — all observability format* functions (44 tests)
`run-manager-pure.test.ts` — OOM detection patterns, duration formatting, run state (27 tests)
`metadata.test.ts` — path helpers, provenance index, run metadata loading (11 tests)
Exported `isOomError` and `formatDuration` from run-manager for testability
Full suite: **187 tests**, all passing (was 105)

name: v0.5.5
body: Added 80 new unit tests covering previously untested modules:
`comfy-server-engine.test.ts` — constructor, buildWorkflow logic (21 tests)
`job-router.test.ts` — run ID generation, workspace keys, index creation (17 tests)
`ffmpeg-utils.test.ts` — cleanupPartialVideo, interface shapes (10 tests)
`types.test.ts` — constants, type contracts, schema guards (17 tests)
Full suite: **235 tests**, all passing (was 155)

name: v0.2.1
body: Added 7 new test files covering previously untested modules:
Logger** (9 tests): message formatting, log levels, error detail handling
UI Primitives Extended** (27 tests): list, input, select, checkbox, tabs, accordion, dialog, image, custom
UI Builders** (31 tests): searchResults, dashboard, wizard, confirmation, statusDisplay, emptyState, errorDisplay
Config Provider** (9 tests): workspace detection, config loading, event emission
Extension Lifecycle** (9 tests): activation, command registration, disposables, deactivation

name: v0.3.4
body: Added 8 new test files covering schema validation, config loader, nvidia/rocm probes, GPU probe dispatch, governor edge cases, experiment store, token bucket, and resource monitor
Fixed pre-existing bug in `init.test.ts` where `minFreeRamGB` was referenced under `gpu` sub-object instead of at root schema level
Added `rocm` to GPU probe enum in config schema
Wired rocm probe into dispatcher with auto-fallback chain: nvidia-smi → rocm-smi → null
Committed previously untracked source files: `rocmProbe.ts`, `format.ts`

name: v0.3.1
body: 102 unit tests** across 7 test files covering all extension modules
Vitest configuration with comprehensive vscode module mock
Exported `parseToolResult` and `formatVttTime` for testability

name: v0.2.0
body: 62 Python unit tests** for CLI core — coverage report parsing, diagnostics, staleness checks, file discovery
37 TypeScript unit tests** for VS Code extension — CLI output parsing, JSON validation, diagnostic publishing, CLI discovery
CI integration** — unit test steps (pytest + vitest) added to CI workflow
CLI discovery converted from blocking `execSync` to async `execFile`
Typo `bySevertity` → `bySeverity` in results tree provider
Extension version aligned with CLI engine (both now 0.2.0)

name: v0.1.2
body: readmeTranslator** (37 tests): segmentReadme parser, cleanTranslation quirk removal for 10+ languages, translateReadme integration
util** (15 tests): getConfig, pickLanguage/pickLanguages, log, friendlyError with contextual error detection
commands** (17 tests): translateSelection, translateFile, checkStatus — edge cases, cancellation, error paths
statusBar** (9 tests): all 4 polling states (ready, Ollama down, model missing, connection error)
statusTree** (10 tests): tree provider states, dispose cleanup, model filtering
Exported `segmentReadme` and `cleanTranslation` for testability

name: v0.1.1
body: First published release of Polyglot for VS Code — local GPU translation powered by TranslateGemma 12B via Ollama.
Translate Selection** — Select text, press `Ctrl+Alt+T`, pick a language
Translate File** — Translate an entire file into a new `file.ja.ext` alongside the original
Translate README** — Batch-translate README.md into 7 languages, preserving code blocks, tables, and badges
Sidebar Panel** — Globe icon in the activity bar with action buttons and live Ollama status
Status Bar** — Real-time Ollama connection status with auto-polling

name: v0.2.2
body: ci: allow vitest to pass with no tests by @mcp-tool-shop in https://github.com/mcp-tool-shop-org/vscode-voice-soundboard/pull/2
